name: Commercial Metals Company
description: Commercial Metals Company (CMC) is a global manufacturer, recycler, and fabricator of steel and metal products, as well as related materials and services. Operating primarily through a network of recycling facilities, steel mini-mills, micro-mills, and fabrication plants, the company provides critical reinforcement solutions for infrastructure, non-residential construction, and industrial applications. CMC is a pioneer in the sustainable steelmaking industry, utilizing electric arc furnace technology to produce high-quality steel from recycled scrap metal.
